intro:
Changing colors opens the way! 
Enjoy 60 colorful puzzles with the adorable Muni. 
Clear stages and freely decorate your own notebook world!
description:
[Pa!nt, a magical world where doodles come to life]

An ordinary notebook becomes the stage for a special adventure with your touch. Become the owner of 'Moony,' a small, cute octopus friend born from a drawing, and explore a puzzle world full of color and imagination!

■ Change the color and the answer appears! Strategic color puzzle

Moony can pass through the same color as itself, but cannot pass through different colors.

Use the surrounding water buckets to change Moony's color and feel the thrilling sensation of paving the way through blocked paths.

■ 60 rich stages and special gimmicks

60 diverse stages await your challenge.

More than 4 special devices that move Moony or change its color add depth to the puzzle.

■ Healing time to decorate your own notebook

As you clear stages, the monotonous home screen transforms into a splendid one!

Dress Moony in cute outfits with items acquired during gameplay to express your own personality.

■ The joy of creation beyond limits

When you need a different challenge, try 'Black and White Mode,' which relies solely on silhouette and senses!
